recalls.Description: Ocean State Job Lot has issued a recall for the Calipso Combi and Tiller & Rowe Growing Table-Mini Greenhouse and Raised Garden Bed due to a potential fire hazard. These products, measuring 32" x 15" x 39" when assembled, feature an opaque cover with vents and a storage shelf beneath the garden bed. The legs and garden bed are gray, while the interior liner is lime green, equipped with a removable grid for seedling spacing.
recalls.Title: Ocean State Job Lot Recalls Growing Table-Mini Greenhouse and Raised Garden Bed Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should stop using the recalled products immediately and contact Ocean State Job Lot at 833-209-7100, available Monday through Friday from 8:30 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET and Saturday from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET. Alternatively, they can email customerservice@osjl.com. Customers who purchased from Home Lot can call 800-647-0783 or email support@mrpearl11.com for assistance.

Products.Name: Calipso Combi Greenhouse and Tiller & Rowe Growing Table

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 10 reports of the recalled greenhouses overheating, including one report of injury.

Retailers.Name: Ocean State Job Lot stores in New England and Home Lot online via Amazon, eBay, and Walmart

Importers.Name: Ocean State Jobbers Inc., of North Kingstown, Rhode Island

Distributors.Name: Ocean State Jobbers Inc., dba Ocean State Job Lot, of North Kingstown, Rhode Island

Remedies.Name: Stop using the product and contact Ocean State Job Lot for a full refund. In-store purchases can be returned for a refund, while online customers must mark the product as 'DO NOT USE' and dispose of it. Home Lot customers should submit a photo of the marked product to support@mrpearl11.com for a refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Ocean State Job Lot recalls Growing Table-Mini Greenhouse due to fire hazards. Stop using immediately and contact for refunds.
